description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a mature deer, characterized by a robust, muscular body covered in a dark brown coat with subtle shading. Its most prominent feature is a large, symmetrical set of branched antlers that rise gracefully from its head, curving outward and upward. The deer has a slender neck, pointed ears that stand upright, and a short, bushy tail. Its legs are long and slender, ending in clearly defined hooves, giving it an agile and alert stance. The facial features are elongated, with a pronounced snout and dark eyes. The overall form is naturalistic, capturing the elegance and alertness typical of deer found in parks or wooded urban areas.
description: A realistic, dark brown deer with large, branched antlers, upright pointed ears, and a short bushy tail, standing alert on slender legs. The body is robust and naturalistic, with clearly visible hooves and detailed facial features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical antlers, upright pointed ears, and the deer's broad chest and face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the body, the curvature of the antlers, and the slender legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the short, bushy tail, the back of the antlers, and the muscular hindquarters.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body profile, antler structure, and leg positioning.
